# Pull request

## What & why

<!-- Short summary of the change and the reason for it. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐞 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] 📝 Docs
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / tooling

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran or manual steps you took. Write "n/a" for docs / chore. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `yarn test` passes
- [ ] `yarn format` run (no Prettier diffs)
- [ ] I reviewed my own diff
- [ ] No secrets, real customer data, or credentials in the diff

## If applicable

<!-- Delete any line that does not apply to this PR. -->

- [ ] Money/tax logic (CHF, 8.1% MWST, 5-Rappen rounding) still correct
- [ ] New DB migration is append-only and applies on a fresh and an existing database
- [ ] UI change includes before / after screenshots
- [ ] User-facing change is reflected in `docs/`
